arts.ttl: Graham Potter: West Ham have set a foundation after riding luck to beat Fulham
arts.sum: Goals from Carlos Soler, Tomas Soucek and Lucas Paqueta made it a winning start in the Premier League for new boss Potter.

arts.ttl: Graham Potter gets West Ham spell up and running with win over Fulham
arts.sum: Goals from Carlos Soler, Tomas Soucek and Lucas Paqueta secured a first Premier League victory for Potter.

arts.ttl: From Brazil: Willian in talks with 2 Premier League clubs – Not returning to Fulham, Arsenal or Chelsea
arts.sum: Willian loves the Premier League, even at the ripe old age of 36. Having been at Chelsea, Arsenal and Fulham, the Brazilian is now negotiating a return to Premier League football, but TNT Brazil say it’s not for any of those London clubs he’s already represented. arts.ttl: Sources: West Ham in talks with OM over Wahi
arts.sum: West Ham United are in active talks with Marseille for the potential transfer of striker Elye Wahi, sources have told ESPN.

arts.ttl: Potter includes Emerson, Rodríguez and Soler for Fulham derby
arts.sum: Subs: Foderingham (GK), Coufal, Cresswell, Scarles, Casey, Orford, Irving, Luis Guilherme, Ings West Ham United: Fabiański, Wan-Bissaka, Mavropanos, Kilman, Emerson, Rodríguez, Álvarez, Souček ©, Soler, Kudus, Paquetá

arts.ttl: West Ham vs Fulham team news LIVE! Potter set for PL Hammers bow
arts.sum: “We scored a good goal from Rodrigo, it was a good finish from him,” Silva said when asked about Muniz’s first-time finish into the bottom right corner. Marco Silva is relishing the competition between Fulham’s striking options after Rodrigo Muniz and Raul Jimenez got among the goals in their 4-1 victory over Watford in the third round of the FA Cup at Craven Cottage.

arts.ttl: “Hugely important” | Hammers need to step up chase for striker
arts.sum: According to media reports, MLS side Atlanta United are said to have submitted a bid of around £16.4 million for Middlesbrough striker Emmanuel Latte Lath who has previously been linked with a move to West Ham. Should Atlanta’s bid be accepted by the Championship side, it would become the most expensive transfer fee paid by...
